subcodes.first_line: In the days when the chiefs of the Bayán would eagerly purchase women's veils that they might conceal themselves from their enemies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در ایامیکه رؤسای بیان چادر نسوانرا بجان میخریدند تا خود را از دشمنان مستور دارند
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
